tests.name: baseline_phase1_steps_completed
tests.details: All 5 phase1_architecture steps (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed via --complete-step on the baseline private_poc project; framework PHASE1_STEPS array sourced from process-checklist.sh

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after Phase 1 gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all phase1_architecture steps and running scripts/check-phase-gate.sh (which exits 0 with 'Phase gates consistent.'), .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase remains 0. process-checklist.sh --help shows no command for phase advancement.
framework_bugs.expected: After completing all Phase 1 steps and gate passes, some scripted path advances .current_phase to 2 (or marks phase_1_to_2 in gates).
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays 0; no documented script advances it. Confirms U-D from prior sweep, still open.

tests.name: baseline_feature_recorded
tests.details: Build loop for uat-feat-1 completed all 6 steps; commit landed; test-gate.sh --record-feature succeeded; features_completed = [uat-feat-1]

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc returned rc=0; full plan + post-upgrade verification ran. PR #17 U-E fix verified — poc_mode read correctly from phase-state.json.

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: .current_phase still 0; .project still uat-agent-61 across upgrade

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build-progress.json features_completed = [uat-feat-1] preserved after upgrade. Build loop is reset (expected — it had completed prior to upgrade); existing recorded feature unchanged.

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output lists 4 files updated (.claude/phase-state.json, .claude/tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md) and runs verify-install.sh, but does NOT enumerate new required documents/checks specific to sponsored_poc (e.g., sponsor agreements, expanded approval log, governance docs). Recorded as documentation gap.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json before running upgrade; upgrade aborted with [FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision and instructions to run scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve. PR #17 U-F fix verified.

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header Changelog block mentions BL-006 (2026-04-24), BL-015 (2026-04-25), and BL-016 (2026-04-25) entries

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep of upgrade output for __PROJECT_NAME__/__PLATFORM__/__LANGUAGE__/__TRACK__ returned no matches. U-I not observed in this upgrade path.

documentation_gaps.gap: upgrade-project.sh --to-sponsored-poc does not list new required artifacts/checks specific to sponsored_poc (sponsor agreement, escalated approval log, additional governance docs). Output mentions 'Files that will be updated' but no 'next required documentation' section.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: grep for password|api[_-]?key|secret|token in committed files matched only legitimate references (GITHUB_TOKEN env in workflows, doc text in builders-guide/security-scan-guide). No leaked credentials.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during run; .claude/process-audit.log is absent as expected (append-only on bypass events)

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles
tests.details: find $WORKDIR/uat-agent-61/.claude -name '*.tmp' returned nothing

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ directories (the report destination); HEAD unchanged at d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494. Framework-self guard from PR #18 holds.

summary: Upgrade flow private_poc -> sponsored_poc on desktop/light succeeded end-to-end; all PR #17/#18/#19 regression-target fixes (U-A non-interactive init, U-E poc_mode read, U-F sentinel guard, U-H helper copy, U-N/U-O framework-self guard) verified intact. One Medium U-D confirmation (no phase-advance script) and one doc gap (upgrade output lacks sponsored_poc next-steps enumeration).
